title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Syntel India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Syntel India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Syntel India Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Syntel India Digital Technologies:
Syntel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India Digital Technologies!
